title: Feedback Loops Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger feedback loops foundations judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Feedback Loops Foundations is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Feedback Loops Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good feedback loops foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Feedback Loops Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
